user.title: Dibby Wemo Setup
user.description: Home Assistant will automatically discover Wemo devices on your network via SSDP and DHCP — usually no manual setup is needed. If devices don't appear (Docker bridge networking, isolated VLAN, etc.) you can list them manually below.

data_description.manual_devices: Comma-separated list of Wemo IPs, e.g. 192.168.1.10, 192.168.1.11:49153

discover.title: Devices Found

discovery_confirm.title: Wemo Device Discovered

abort.single_instance_allowed: Only one Dibby Wemo integration is allowed. Use Configure on the existing entry to add more devices manually.
abort.not_wemo_device: Device does not appear to be a Wemo.

error.discovery_failed: SSDP discovery failed. Check network settings.

discover.title: Discover Wemo Devices

settings.title: Dibby Wemo Settings
settings.description: Adjust discovery + polling intervals, or add devices manually if SSDP / unicast scan isn't finding them.

data_description.manual_devices: Comma-separated list of Wemo IPs, e.g. 192.168.1.10, 192.168.1.11:49153
